description: Composition Purple kurti made of georgette, has a round keyhole neck with a hook closure, heavily beaded yoke, three-quarter sleeves with asymmetric cuffs, drop waist with drawstrings and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear your art on the go and flaunt your ethno-modern sense of style with ease by slipping into this kurti from aneri. The flow georgette fabric offers exemplary comfort, while the heavily beaded yoke and drop waist heighten the fashion statement of this kurti. Team it with jeans and chunky earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
